docs.title: Bugfish Documentations
docs.text: Here you can find a list of my projects and related documentation websites. All documentation pages are included in the repositories themselves (docs folder) and are running with HTML/JS/CSS. So they won't need PHP or a web server to be executed, and you can view these documentations everywhere in the repository and release files with your phone or desktop/laptop browser. If you find any errors or questions unanswered, do not hesitate to contact us at requests@bugfish.eu!

docs.title: bugfishCMS
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: The PHP CMS multi-site framework stands as a resilient and adaptable content management system meticulously crafted for swift website deployment. Featuring an intuitive interface and robust functionalities, it empowers web developers to adeptly create and oversee numerous websites within a unified platform. Seamlessly streamlining website setup, customization, and maintenance, this framework proves to be an optimal solution for businesses and developers seeking swift and hassle-free online establishment across a spectrum of web projects.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Bugfish Framework
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: The Bugfish Framework is a powerful web development tool that seamlessly integrates PHP, CSS, and JavaScript to empower developers with a robust set of tools and resources. This versatile framework offers a comprehensive collection of meticulously documented PHP classes, enabling developers to streamline their projects and create highly efficient and well-structured web applications. With Bugfish Framework, you can harness the full potential of these technologies, facilitating the development process and ensuring the creation of feature-rich and scalable web solutions.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Bind9 Web Manager
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: In today's interconnected digital landscape, efficient DNS management is pivotal for uninterrupted online operations. Whether you're an administrator responsible for overseeing DNS records, user access, or seeking a dependable DNS solution, simplicity and functionality are top priorities. Introducing Bind9 Web Manager: the comprehensive solution for effortless DNS management, user administration, and replication functionalities. Featuring an intuitive PHP-based web interface, Bind9 Web Manager empowers administrators to configure DNS servers seamlessly, including replication functionality to collaborate with platforms such as Plesk, ISPConfig, or Virtualmin. Bid farewell to complexity and welcome a system that offers detailed domain oversight, robust debugging tools, and streamlined user management, making DNS management an efficient and straightforward task.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Dolibarr Framework
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: This is a Dolibarr Module to include the Bugfish - Framework into Dolibarr with some additional Functions. A Dolibarr Module to add Development and Other useful Coding and Logging Features, it can intercept MySQL and Javascript Errors. It has a full functional Changelog for different Internal areas and can serve messages for different modules if you are a developer! Dolibarr External Functions delivered in this project are already included in this Dolibarr Module. But if you want to use these functions without the module, you can include the file dolibarr_functions.php.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Mail Relaying over DNS
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: This web software converts your server into a mail backup relay! It functions independently, allowing users to configure domains for relaying to master mail servers. Additionally, it serves as a panel on a secondary DNS server, fetching registered DNS domains. In essence, if your primary mail server handles mail sending and receiving, this server remains unaffected. However, in the event of the primary server going offline, this secondary server stores incoming mail until the primary server is operational again. The stored mail is subsequently forwarded to the primary server. Users can configure the Master-Mail Server per domain and establish various Relay Servers connected to Mail Domains.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Online Book Renting
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: Introducing our streamlined web software crafted for effective book rental management. Featuring user-friendly functionalities including robust user management, seamless multi-language support, and efficient book/ISBN handling, our platform, powered by Apache2 and PHP, offers an accessible interface. Whether you're a bookstore streamlining operations or an avid reader seeking easy book renting and ISBN tracking, our software provides a straightforward solution tailored to your needs.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Android Web App Example
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: This is a ready-to-use Android Studio Project to compile a simple Webapp with some controls at the bottom (Forward, Back, Home). You can just change the related URL inside the main.java file and compile it - after that, you have a finished .apk file. With this project, you can easily create your own website's Web-App. You just need to have Android Studio installed on your system, then you can open the project and change the required data! This will give you the possibility to easily deploy apps related to your website if you need them!

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Dovecot Certificate Interface
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: The software simplifies Dovecot per Domain SSL Certificate setup, enabling seamless login across multiple domains using valid server certificates. It automates ISPConfig Dovecot Configuration File Generation for SSL domains and can function autonomously, managing Dovecot per Domain SSL Certificates without ISPConfig integration. However, caution is advised when applying it alongside existing Dovecot configurations (e.g., Plesk) to prevent possible system malfunctions.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Image Download Manager
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: The image downloader software facilitates the retrieval of all images from a designated website by simply entering its URL. The program automatically creates directories within the executable folder to house the downloaded images. Users can configure settings to explore subpages and selectively download High Definition Images (minimum 1000 pixels width). While compatibility may vary across websites, the tool offers a convenient solution for image retrieval.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: jQuery Sortselect
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: The updated "multiselect-sortable" jQuery plugin enriches the capabilities of the HTML <select multiple="multiple"> element by introducing dual sortable select boxes, making it an ideal tool for optimizing your web projects. This plugin is equipped with enhanced features that offer developers an expanded toolkit for web project development.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Proxmox VMA2RAW
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Description: This repository provides the necessary files and a ready-to-use Docker image to convert Proxmox VMA backup files to raw disk images. These raw images can then be accessed or mounted with Windows software.

  • Download
  • Documentation
  • GitHub

docs.title: Website
docs.text: For product-specific support, please comment directly in the relevant sections of our website. For general inquiries, visit bugfish.eu.

docs.title: Forum
docs.text: For faster assistance, post in our forum at bugfish.eu/forum. Alternatively, email us at requests@bugfish.eu.

docs.title: GitHub
docs.text: For technical issues or feature requests, open an issue in our GitHub repository via the Navigation/Header Link on our site.
